title: STEM Skills, Safety, and Investigation Habits
unitGoal: Students will practise asking testable questions, planning fair tests, using tools safely, recording data, and explaining conclusions with evidence.

lessons.title: Science as Careful Observation
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned student activity set on observing carefully, describing what is seen, and separating observations from guesses.

lessons.title: Asking Testable Questions
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned student activity set on turning broad wonder questions into questions that can be investigated fairly.

lessons.title: Fair Tests and Variables
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned student activity set on changing one thing, keeping other conditions the same, and recognizing controlled variables.

lessons.title: Measuring and Recording Data
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned student activity set on choosing suitable tools, units, charts, tables, and careful measurements.

lessons.title: Evidence and Conclusions
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned student activity set on using data to support conclusions and noticing when evidence is weak or incomplete.

lessons.title: The STEM Design Process
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned student activity set on identifying a problem, imagining solutions, planning, building, testing, improving, and communicating.

lessons.title: Safety and Research Habits
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned student activity set on safe tool use, reliable information, respectful teamwork, and careful digital research.

lessons.title: Unit 1 Final Quiz
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned final quiz on observations, testable questions, fair tests, variables, evidence, safety, and the STEM design process.
